## HEALTH prelude
Run one bounded `/flywheel:tick` for this repo, constrained to the driver-selected phase `DISPATCH`. Read AGENTS.md first, then execute the normal flywheel tick path for `/Users/josh/Developer/flywheel`.

Phase guardrails: previous callback `next_phase` is authoritative when present. Do not fall back to RESEARCH when `br` is unavailable and `.beads/issues.jsonl` or plans provide enough state. JSONL open beads mean DISPATCH; all-closed beads with plans mean BEADS.

VALIDATE phase guardrail: DISPATCH callback reap flows to VALIDATE before INTEGRATE. If callback validation is pending, fail, or unknown, remain in VALIDATE and record remediation state. Only status=pass may proceed to INTEGRATE.

Frozen detector v2 guardrail: no dispatch into FROZEN, UNKNOWN, unhealthy source, or incomplete L60 5-signal state unless FLYWHEEL_TICK_FROZEN_DETECTOR_OVERRIDE=1 is set. Current block reason: none.

NTM surface validation guardrail: inspect ntm_surface_coverage_avg and FAIL/UNVERIFIED rows before claiming the native surface matrix is converged. Known backfill gaps are advisory unless the driver is run with --strict.

Callback validation guardrail: if Callback validation pre-tick reports status=fail or status=unknown, do not summarize or integrate the callback as DONE until bead, reopen-candidate, or no-bead remediation routing is recorded.

chain_if_capacity: if this tick names a concrete next_phase and dispatch capacity remains, run that next phase in this same orchestrator turn. If capacity or safety gates block chaining, callback with chain_blocked_reason=<concrete cause>. Missing chain and missing blocker increments ticks_punted_count.

Callback discipline remains the repo default: worker callbacks go through `/Users/josh/.local/bin/ntm send` with `--no-cass-check`.

## Callback envelope
Send exactly one line when complete:
